features.sectionSubtitle: Every feature designed with one goal: keeping your private life private.

calculator.title: Calculator Disguise

dashboard.desc: Store photos, videos, documents, audio files, and passwords — all encrypted and secured on your device.

items.title: Total Privacy

items.title: No Cloud — 100% On Device
items.desc: Your files never leave your phone. No servers, no uploads, no risk of leaks.

items.title: Every Type of Content
items.desc: Photos, videos, documents, audio files, and passwords — all protected in one app.

items.title: Free & Easy to Use

testimonials.sectionSubtitle: Join millions of people who protect their privacy with Photo Vault every day.

items.name: Alex M.
items.text: Finally an app that actually hides my private photos. The calculator disguise is genius — my partner uses my phone all the time and has no idea. Absolutely love it.

items.name: Jessica T.
items.text: I was skeptical at first, but this app is amazing. My private photos are safe and the calculator looks completely real. The break-in alerts are a great bonus.

items.name: David K.
items.text: The best privacy app I've ever used. It actually works as a calculator so nobody gets suspicious. I use it for photos, documents, and even passwords. 10/10.
